# Q2 comp count distinct + sort (lateral movement rdp)

**Dataset**: `gx_06_rdp` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

RDP lateral-movement hunting — remote-desktop connection patterns across hosts. Q2 comp count distinct + sort. `count_distinct()` is the distinct-count (never `dcount`).

```sql
dataset = gx_06_rdp | comp count_distinct(dst_host) as hosts_reached by user | sort desc hosts_reached
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 5). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
